_meta: Hand-authored neutral example config. scaffold_config.py leaves an existing config untouched.
dek: Six common general-knowledge claims, each checked against a live primary source rather than simply asserted.
footer_methods: Engines: Exa research/answer, OpenAI o4-mini deep research, Perplexity sonar and deep, Claude deep research. Each fact passed fact-check gates: confirmed by a live class A/B source. The number next to a fact is how many engines found it.
footer_note: Assembled by the research-stack fact-check funnel. Topic: example.
